series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to the children residing at the Ohio Veterans Children's Home, previously known as the Ohio Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Orphans Home. These records include education and residential information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from birth date of child residing at home. Some files were digitized, yet originals are still in paper format. enrollment cards and applications admissions will be pulled out of files and transferred Greene County Library in Xenia, OH. ; Electronic: electronic format, from birth date of child residing at home
